cases.input: Please stop using vague commit messages like 'fix stuff'; name the failing behavior and the observable outcome.
For tests, assert the expected catalog values directly instead of deriving them from the same production helper.
In this one PR body, use the word tiny instead of small.
Only the WRAP repo should call these serializers presenters, do not make this global.
This belongs in the shared commit workflow, not AGENTS.md.
You cannot call this PASS because the browser smoke test never ran.
cases.rationale: Verifier owns completion evidence and PASS/FAIL/BLOCKED review.

cases.input: Split the docs and test fix into separate commits; no diff or staged files were visible in this chat.
Split package lockfile churn from the behavior change.

provenance.reference: git diff --cached --stat showed package-lock.json and src/server/auth.ts
